name: merge-review
description: >- Reviews pending fleet worktree merges before they're accepted. Reads the merge-check queue, detects file-level conflicts between branches, proposes a safe merge order, and surfaces reconciliation plans for overlapping changes.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个代码合并预检工具，能提前发现分支间的文件冲突，自动规划安全的合并顺序并给出解决建议，专治多分支并行开发时的合并混乱与冲突难题。
